# Choose a compatible cache migration

## Goal

Ship the cache format change without breaking existing clients.

## Settled

- Keep reading the old format during the transition because deployed clients still write it.

## Still open

- Decide whether the new writer should dual-write for one release; this controls rollback safety.

## Key evidence

- Production telemetry shows 18% of active clients still use the old writer, so an immediate cutover is unsafe.

## Continue here

Choose dual-write or a read-only compatibility window after checking storage cost for one release.
